positive.prompt: Design a modern dark-mode color scheme and component layout for our dashboard
Help me choose typography and layout principles for an aesthetic landing page
How do I design a glassmorphic card design with CSS?

negative.prompt: Make this React page load 2 seconds faster
Audit the WCAG color contrast compliance of this form

evals.prompt: Design the visual layout and CSS variables for a modern dashboard sidebar, prioritizing layout aesthetics.
evals.expected_output: Modern layout styles and theme-consistent typography are generated.
expectations: A cohesive color scheme using CSS variables is defined
Modern layout styles (Flexbox/Grid, spacing tokens) are used
Visual hierarchy is established using font weights and typography
Interactive state designs (hover, active) are specified
